nasb.text: Agrippa said to Paul, “You are permitted to speak for yourself.” Then Paul stretched out his hand and proceeded to make his defense:

esv.text: So Agrippa said to Paul, “You have permission to speak for yourself.” Then Paul stretched out his hand and made his defense:

cnv.text: 亞基帕對保羅說：“准你為自己申辯。”於是保羅伸手辯護說：

ccb.text: 亚基帕对保罗说：“准你为自己辩护。”于是保罗伸手示意，然后为自己辩护说：

csbs.text: 阿格里帕对保罗说：“你获准为自己说话。” 于是保罗伸手开始申辩：
